title: Dashboard redesign — truth preservation and usability verification
gate: Do NOT begin until DASHBOARD_PERFORMANCE_POLISH_001 is APPROVED.
objective: Verify that the redesigned dashboard preserves the verified truth model end-to-end. No code changes. Read-only verification against the architecture spec and the known incidents. Produce a written verification report.

truth_model.method: Identify any open BUY_YES position. Read its current_held_price from the LIVE tab. Confirm it matches bid_yes from /api/stream/state or state_hub, not bid_no.
Identify any open BUY_NO position. Read its current_held_price from the LIVE tab. Confirm it matches bid_no, not bid_yes.
truth_model.pass: current_held_price == bid_no for BUY_NO — this is the SEA/TEX incident check

truth_model.method: For a BUY_NO position where bid_no > entry_px, confirm unrealized_pct is positive (profit). For a BUY_NO position where bid_no < entry_px, confirm unrealized_pct is negative (loss).
truth_model.pass: Sign is correct for both sides — this directly re-checks the SEA/TEX incident root cause

truth_model.method: Review HISTORY or POSITIONS tab for recently closed trades. Confirm exit_px for a BUY_NO close is a NO-side price (near 0.5-0.99 range), not a YES-side price.
truth_model.pass: Closed BUY_NO exit_px reflects NO contract bid, not YES price — this checks BOS/MIL incident root cause

truth_model.check: No shadow competing with position truth
truth_model.method: Open LIVE tab. Confirm no advisory/shadow section appears. Open GAMES tab. Confirm advisory section is visually distinct and labeled.
truth_model.pass: Shadow absent from LIVE tab. Advisory clearly labeled in GAMES tab.

truth_model.method: If possible, note the last stream update age shown in SYSTEM tab. Confirm stale badge appears on position card prices if stream is older than 30s.
truth_model.pass: STALE badge behavior present (even if not triggered if stream is live)

truth_model.method: Confirm position cards show team name (e.g. 'LAD WIN') not raw market slug.
truth_model.pass: No raw slug visible on LIVE or POSITIONS tab cards

usability.method: Load http://localhost:8900. Confirm LIVE tab is active by default.
Resize browser to 390px or use dev tools. Confirm no horizontal scroll, cards stack vertically.

usability.check: Trade log not on main page
usability.method: Confirm trade log is in HISTORY tab only, not visible on LIVE tab.
usability.pass: Trade log absent from LIVE tab DOM (or display:none)

usability.method: Switch between all 5 tabs. Confirm command bar / account strip remains visible on all tabs.
usability.pass: Bankroll and win rate visible on all tabs

usability.method: Open browser console. Confirm no errors on load and after 30s of operation.

contents: truth_model_checks: pass/fail for each check above with observed values
usability_checks: pass/fail for each check above
incidents_re_verified: explicit statement on whether SEA/TEX BUY_NO pricing and BOS/MIL close pricing are correct in the redesigned dashboard
outstanding_issues: any checks that could not be verified and why
recommendation: proceed to DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_AUDIT_001 or fix required

acceptance_criteria: Explicit confirmation that BUY_NO current_held_price = bid_no (not bid_yes)
Explicit confirmation that shadow is absent from LIVE tab
proof_of_work: Submit result JSON with per-check pass/fail and observed values
Include explicit statement on SEA/TEX and BOS/MIL incident re-verification
out_of_scope: Any fixes — if verification fails, raise CHANGES_REQUESTED against the relevant implementation phase, not this task
rollback: No changes made. Nothing to revert.
